description: Reliable garden maintenance, hedge trimming, lawn care, and full garden clearances across the local area.

lawn mowing.advice: If it's been a while, a one-off tidy-up first then a regular fortnightly cut keeps it neat year-round.
lawn mowing.quote_notes: Small front lawn is £30-40. Standard rear lawn is £45-55. Large lawn or includes edging and strimming is £60-70.

hedge trimming.advice: Best done before nesting season starts (late winter/early spring) or after it ends (late summer).
hedge trimming.quote_notes: Small hedge or single side is £60-90. Mid-size hedge cut on top and both sides is £100-140. Large overgrown hedge needing height reduction is £160-200.

garden clearance.advice: We bring all the tools and take everything away — you don't need to do anything to prep.
garden clearance.quote_notes: Small garden tidy and weed is £120-160. Mid-sized clearance with green waste removal is £200-280. Heavily overgrown gardens needing multiple visits or skip hire is £350-400.

lawn treatment.advice: Best results come from a proper feed in spring and again in autumn — moss treatment is most effective in autumn.
lawn treatment.quote_notes: Single feed and weed treatment is £50-70. Full scarify and aerate plus feed is £90-120.

tree work.advice: If the tree is near power lines or the road, we'll need to check if there's a Tree Preservation Order before quoting.
tree work.quote_notes: Crown lift or light pruning of a small tree is £150-220. Larger tree reduction is £300-450. Full removal with stump grinding is £500-600.
